title: Search Feature on Dashboards in the Mobile App
excerpt: Hi, We are using the mobile app for most of the field updates and have a dashboard that is connected to multiple boards with relevant information. If we can put a search and filter option same as the web version to searc…

posts.author: Jaglan (Aman Jaglanb)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, We are using the mobile app for most of the field updates and have a dashboard that is connected to multiple boards with relevant information. If we can put a search and filter option same as the web version to search all the updates throughout the dashboard for a specific item.
